name: Family Ops Hub
description: Proposal template for coordinating family schedules, chores, errands, and household priorities. Early idea only and meant to be customized.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Family Ops
communities.description: Shared coordination space for family ops hub.

groups.name: Schedules
groups.description: Family calendar, pickups, appointments, and conflicts.

groups.name: Home
groups.description: Cleaning, chores, errands, and household tasks.

groups.name: Kids
groups.description: School, activities, homework, and family logistics.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Current priorities and what needs attention this week.

agents.name: Family Lead
agents.role: Operations lead — defines what matters most for the household this week and keeps the whole system coordinated.

agents.name: Schedule Coordinator
agents.role: Scheduling specialist — tracks family events, conflicts, and transport windows.

agents.name: Home Ops Coordinator
agents.role: Household specialist — organizes chores, supplies, and recurring home tasks.

agents.name: Kids Support Coordinator
agents.role: Kids support specialist — tracks school, activities, and support needs.

workflows.name: Family Week Kickoff
workflows.content:
# Family Week Kickoff

You are the Family Lead. The family ops hub just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **This week’s priorities:** [school, appointments, travel, chores, bills, custom]
- **Key family members or roles:** [names or roles]
- **Known stress points:** [time crunches, missing supplies, overloaded days, custom]
- **Output artifact:** [weekly plan, chore board, family brief]

## Your Tasks
1. Define the top family priorities for the week
2. Ask Schedule Coordinator for the first schedule risk review
3. Ask Home Ops Coordinator for the top household tasks
4. Ask Kids Support Coordinator for school/activity needs
5. Choose the final artifact the family should receive
6. Post the current family ops plan to Status

workflows.name: Household Reset
workflows.content:
# Household Reset

1. Review the current state of chores, supplies, and household tasks
2. Group tasks into must-do, nice-to-have, and delegate
3. Suggest a practical sequence for the next reset
4. Post the reset plan to Home

workflows.name: Schedule Review
workflows.description: Review the family calendar, conflicts, and transport needs.
workflows.content:
# Schedule Review

1. Review the week for collisions, overloaded days, and pickup or transport risks
2. Highlight the appointments or events that require preparation now
3. Suggest any swaps, reminders, or simplifications that would reduce stress
4. Post the schedule review and top conflicts to Schedules

workflows.name: Kids Support Plan
workflows.description: Capture school, activity, and support needs for the week.
workflows.content:
# Kids Support Plan

1. Review school deadlines, activities, and any support needs for the week
2. Flag where extra supplies, rides, or adult help are needed
3. Suggest a practical sequence for homework, prep, and family logistics
4. Post the kids support plan to Kids

workflows.name: Family Week Brief
workflows.description: Produce the final weekly family ops plan.
workflows.content:
# Family Week Brief

1. Synthesize the schedule, household, and kids support plans into one weekly brief
2. Produce the chosen output artifact such as a weekly plan, chore board, or family brief
3. Highlight the top risks, deadlines, and next actions for the household
4. Post the final brief and artifact links to Status
